title: Econom Taxi App
description: A taxi booking application built with Flutter that enables cost-effective rides within and between cities. The app serves both drivers and passengers with an intuitive interface.
features: Real-time location tracking and route optimization
In-app chat between drivers and passengers
Driver status management and booking system
challenges: Implementing real-time location tracking while optimizing battery consumption was a major challenge. This was resolved by using efficient geolocation algorithms and Firebase Cloud Messaging for updates.
